title: Wrap Texts in cells and headers
excerpt: I know this request has been made a few times so I am hoping to bring this more towards the top again.  Wrapping text has been sitting in the “Coming Soon” pile for a while now but that request is three years old… Hopefu…

posts.author: bpatnode27 (Brendan Patnode)
posts.cookedHtml: I know this request has been made a few times so I am hoping to bring this more towards the top again. Wrapping text has been sitting in the “Coming Soon” pile for a while now but that request is three years old… Hopefully we can get this added and move past the insufficient work around of changing Item height.

posts.author: mdeulley (Mark D)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bpatnode27 - I just went to create my post and this, and I found your’s. I voted it up.

This issue has been open since Nov of 2019 (Wrap Text in Column). There is another post that has over 800 votes as of 6/9/2025… Wrap text in column headings and/or cells.

I am responding to your post as well in the hopes that it might move the needle.
